title: Tianhui News Brief丨Ride the dragon to show your ambitions
contentHtml:
February 2, the dragon raises its head

Folk proverb goes like this"On the second day of the second lunar month, the dragon raises its head." The second day of the second lunar month is when all things revive and take on new life. Every February 2nd, everyone eats pig head meat to seek good luck.

In order to bring good wishes to everyone, the cafeteria carefully prepared pork head meat for everyone on February 2nd. I hope every employee will have good luck in the new year, ride the dragon, and make great achievements!

New beginning, new hope

On the afternoon of March 8, 2024, Tianhui Group held an announcement on the adjustment of the leadership team of the Logistics Department.All employees of Tianhui Group participated in the reading meeting.

This leadership team adjustment involves three company employees. Wang Teng, the former director of the logistics department, was transferred to the sales department. Li Haoyang, the former deputy director of the logistics department, was promoted to the current director of the logistics department. Shao Jiayan, a former employee of the logistics department, was promoted to the current deputy director of the logistics department.

Mr. Du highly affirmed Wang Teng's work results and performance over the years, and expressed his expectations for the three colleagues involved in this personnel adjustment. Subsequently, three colleagues, Wang Teng, Li Haoyang and Shao Jiayan, took the stage to speak, jointly expressing their gratitude to the company and promising to continue working hard in future work and live up to high expectations.
titleZh: 天晖新闻简讯丨乘龙而上 大展宏图
contentHtmlZh:
二月二，龙抬头

民谚有云“二月二，龙抬头”，农历二月初二，正是万物复苏，焕发新生之时。每当二月二，大家都会吃猪头肉来讨个好彩头。

为了给大家带去美好的祝福，食堂在二月二这天为大家精心准备了猪头肉，希望每位员工在新的一年里都能好运当头，乘龙而上，大展宏图！

新开始，新希望

2024年3月8日下午，天晖集团召开了物流部领导班子调整宣读会，天晖集团全体员工参与了此次宣读会。

此次领导班子调整涉及三位公司员工，原物流部部长王腾调任至销售部，原物流部副部长李浩阳擢升为现物流部部长，原物流部员工邵家妍升任为现物流部副部长。

杜总对王腾多年来的工作成果与业绩给予了高度肯定，并表达了对此次涉及人事调整的三位同事的期望。随后，王腾、李浩阳和邵家妍三位同事上台发言，共同表达了对公司的感谢，也承诺在未来的工作中会继续努力，不负厚望。
